title: Object Count (0x5E)
description: Layout for triplet 0x5E: Object Count triplet. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are not represented here.

elements.name: SubObj
elements.description: Subordinate object type (CODE, 1 byte). Example: X'AF' = Page.

elements.name: SObjNum
elements.description: Number of subordinate objects contained in this object (UBIN, 4 bytes).

elements.name: SObjNumHi
elements.description: High-order bytes of subordinate object count (UBIN, 4 bytes). Optional; present when extended length used.
